name: Dr. Warren's Surgery
description: A clean, spare room above a apothecary on Hanover Street, smelling of camphor and dried herbs — Dr. Warren uses it as both a medical practice and a private meeting room for Sons of Liberty intelligence work. Tonight the surgery is locked, but a light burns in the upstairs window and the sound of papers being sorted carries into the street.
atmosphericDetails: A row of small labeled jars lines the windowsill — between the medicinal herbs, one jar contains tightly rolled slips of paper rather than dried leaves.
A half-decoded document is spread on the writing desk, weighted at the corners by medical instruments.
The lock on the surgery door is a newer, heavier model than anything else on the street — someone invested in security here.
